name: Rebrandly API
what_it_does: Creates branded short links with custom domains, QR codes, and link analytics via a REST API.
use_cases: Generate branded trackable short links for marketing campaigns
Create QR codes for print or physical media from any URL
Manage and organize links across multiple custom domains
Track click analytics, UTM parameters, and conversion events
not_for: Anonymous or one-off URL shortening without branding needs
High-volume link creation on free tier (500 links/month cap)
Real-time sub-100ms redirect requirements at massive scale
best_when: Brands that need custom-domain short links with built-in QR code generation and granular analytics.
avoid_when: You just need simple URL shortening without branding — Bitly or TinyURL are simpler and cheaper.

auth.notes: API key passed as `apikey` header; workspace-specific keys available on higher plans

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $13/month; Pro from $25/month; Enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Free plan includes 1 custom domain which is unusual among competitors

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON error responses with descriptive messages; some edge cases return generic 400s
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Can set a custom slashtag to make link creation idempotent; default creates new links
known_agent_gotchas: Domain verification required before using custom domains — can block automated workflows
Slashtag uniqueness constraint returns 409 on conflict; agents must handle gracefully
QR code generation endpoint is separate from link creation — two API calls needed
Workspace ID required on multi-workspace accounts — agents must track this

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; simple API key auth with no scope granularity
